testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService constructor should be defined when baseURL is set
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService constructor should be defined when baseURL is set

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService constructor should be defined when baseURL is not set (graceful degradation)
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService constructor should be defined when baseURL is not set (graceful degradation)

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService constructor initialises client without auth header when apiKey is not set
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService constructor initialises client without auth header when apiKey is not set

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService ping() returns false when client is not initialised (no baseURL)
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService ping() returns false when client is not initialised (no baseURL)

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService ping() returns true when /api/v1/health/ready GET succeeds
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService ping() returns true when /api/v1/health/ready GET succeeds

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService ping() falls back to /api/v1/health/live when ready endpoint is missing
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService ping() falls back to /api/v1/health/live when ready endpoint is missing

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService ping() returns false when all health endpoints fail
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService ping() returns false when all health endpoints fail

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService ping() authenticates with tribe credentials before health probe
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService ping() authenticates with tribe credentials before health probe

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService get() normalizes APICenter path and returns data/correlationId from response headers
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService get() normalizes APICenter path and returns data/correlationId from response headers

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService get() unwraps APICenter success envelope and falls back to meta correlationId
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService get() unwraps APICenter success envelope and falls back to meta correlationId

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService get() uses tribe credentials to mint APICenter token when configured
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService get() uses tribe credentials to mint APICenter token when configured

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService get() throws when client is not initialised
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService get() throws when client is not initialised

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService post() normalizes APICenter path and returns data/correlationId from response
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService post() normalizes APICenter path and returns data/correlationId from response

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService post() unwraps APICenter success envelope in POST response
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService post() unwraps APICenter success envelope in POST response

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService post() throws when client is not initialised
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService post() throws when client is not initialised

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService post() does not retry failed POST requests
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService post() does not retry failed POST requests

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService kafka helpers kafkaListClusters calls the APICenter external clusters path
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService kafka helpers kafkaListClusters calls the APICenter external clusters path

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService kafka helpers kafkaListTopics URL-encodes cluster id
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService kafka helpers kafkaListTopics URL-encodes cluster id

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService kafka helpers kafkaProduceRecords URL-encodes path segments and sends records envelope
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService kafka helpers kafkaProduceRecords URL-encodes path segments and sends records envelope

testcase.classname: ApiCenterSdkService kafka helpers buildTenantTopic normalizes tribe id and suffix
testcase.name: ApiCenterSdkService kafka helpers buildTenantTopic normalizes tribe id and suffix
